title: Reduce the complexity of the buildah.Run function
body:
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

This is causing HOMU to fail

comments.body: See [gocyclo's README](https://github.com/alecthomas/gocyclo/tree/master/README.md) for a more detailed explanation.

Fixed ClearProcessCapabiltiies, and also used a function for AppArmor.
